title: Integration: MITM detection and security failure modes
description: Verify all security-critical failure modes work correctly end-to-end

steps.action: Extension connects with mismatched PSK (simulating MITM)
steps.expected: Hello decryption fails, WebSocket closed with code 4002, no plaintext fallback

steps.action: Extension connects, then sends message with duplicated sequence number
Extension connects, intercept a ciphertext frame, flip one byte, relay it
steps.expected: WebSocket closed with code 4002 (GCM auth tag failure)

steps.action: Rotate auth token, attempt connection with old token
Verify no plaintext CDP data appears in daemon logs during any error scenario
steps.expected: Log inspection shows only encrypted payloads and error codes, never plaintext message content
